'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 2''' was the second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 9]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Chris Gardner]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

==Contents==
:'''Battles & Events''':
:*[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] {{C|END 1-4}}
:*:<small>The destruction of the second Death Star and the end of an era.</small>
:'''Characters''':
:*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] {{C|SOL 3-8}}
:*:<small>Smuggler and pilot of the ''Millennium Falcon'' who became a Rebel hero.</small>
:*[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] (including [[Voort saBinring]]) {{C|GAM 1-4}}
:*:<small>The tough, brutish species who guarded the palace of Jabba the Hutt.</small>
:'''Planets & Locations''':
:*[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] {{C|HOT 1-4}}
:*:<small>An inhospitable planet of icy wastes and a vast array of wildlife.</small>
:'''Droids''':
:*[[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|IT-O interrogation droid]] {{C|INT 1-2}}
:*:<small>One of the technological horrors of the Empire.</small>
:'''Weapons & Technology''':
:*[[Dejarik/Legends|Dejarik]] hologame {{C|DEJ 1-2}}
:*:<small>3D in-flight entertainment on the ''Millennium Falcon''.</small>
:'''Vehicles''':
:*[[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's Podracer]] {{C|POD 1-2}}
:*:<small>The fastest Podracer at the Boonta Eve Classic.</small>

==Development==
The Gamorreans article includes unattributed original artwork depicting [[Voort saBinring|Voort "Piggy" saBinring]].<ref name="Issue" />
